home.motivationFirst: Ready for your first workout this week?
home.motivationGoalReached: You've hit your weekly goal — great work! 🎉
home.motivationRemaining: {count} {count, plural, one {workout} other {workouts}} to go until your weekly goal.
home.newSchemaTitle: Your trainer has prepared a new plan for you
home.newSchemaDefault: '{name}' is ready — open it and start your workout.
home.noSchema: No plan assigned yet. Ask your trainer.
home.noSchemaRequest: No plan assigned yet. Request one from your trainer.
home.emptyDesc: Start your plan and check off your sets. Your progress, records and streak appear here automatically.

schema.emptyDesc: Your trainer is putting a plan together for you. Request one with your goal and preferences, or explore the machines in your gym in the meantime.
schema.validityExpiringDesc: Valid for {days, plural, one {# more day} other {# more days}}. Ask your trainer for a new schema.
schema.validityExpiredDesc: Time for a new schema — ask your trainer.

active.notePlaceholder: Note (e.g. felt heavy, mind your form)…
active.goalRemaining: {count} {count, plural, one {workout} other {workouts}} to go until your weekly goal.

scan.title: Scan machine
scan.cameraError: Can't open the camera. Allow camera access or enter the machine manually.
scan.aim: Point your camera at the QR code on the machine.

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.subtitle: View instructions, animations and step-by-step guides for every exercise in your gym.
exercises.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, muscle or equipment…
exercises.emptyNone: Your gym hasn't added any exercises yet.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Your progress in numbers.
history.emptyDesc: As soon as you log your first workout, your records, streak and progress charts appear here.

requests.title: Request a training plan
requests.subtitle: Share your goal and preferences — your trainer will put together a personal plan for you.
requests.successBody: Your trainer has received your request. You'll see the status below and get a notification as soon as there's news.
requests.alreadyPending: You already have a pending request. Once your trainer has completed it, you can submit a new one.
requests.descPlaceholder: E.g. I'd like a plan with more focus on my shoulders.

rooster.title: Schedule
rooster.subtitle: Sign up for group classes.
rooster.emptyDesc: There are no group classes in the schedule right now. Check back later or ask your gym about availability.

muscles.title: Muscle analysis
muscles.subtitle: See which muscles your schema trains — and whether you're following it.
muscles.emptyDesc: Once you have a training schema, this page shows which muscle groups it trains.
muscles.heatmapIntro: Colour = weekly volume that {schema} spends per muscle group.
muscles.compareIntro: Compare the target volume with what you actually did over the last 4 weeks.
muscles.noActual: No workouts logged in the last 4 weeks yet. Once you train, your comparison appears here.
muscles.notEnough: Not enough data yet to compare muscle groups.
muscles.disclaimer: This analysis is a tool based on your schema, not medical advice. In doubt? Consult a trainer or professional.
muscles.tapHint: Tap a muscle group for details
muscles.detailPlanActual: {plan} sets/week in your schema · {actual} actually trained

dashboard.activeToday: {count} {count, plural, one {member has} other {members have}} already trained today.
dashboard.noTrainingToday: No workouts today yet — time to activate your members.

widgets.popularExercisesDesc: Popular exercises appear as soon as members train.
widgets.recentActivityDesc: Management actions appear here as they happen.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiDesc: A chat assistant for members, limited to your equipment and with a mandatory safety notice. Status: <status>{status}</status>.
settings.contactDesc: These details are visible to your members on their Gym page. Empty fields are not shown.
settings.memberSchemaDesc: Let members build their own training schema. Current mode: <status>{status}</status>.
settings.memberSchemaHintDISABLED: The feature is off. Members cannot build their own schema.
settings.memberSchemaHintAPPROVAL: Members build a schema and submit it; a coach approves it before it becomes active.
settings.memberSchemaHintDIRECT: Members activate their own schema directly. The gym sees everything and can adjust.
settings.supportDesc: Ask a question, report an issue or request support from the GymRebel team.

support.title: Contact support
support.intro: Ask your question or report an issue. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
support.name: Name
support.subject: Subject
support.messageHint: Describe your question or issue as clearly as possible.
support.successToast: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

members.descAdmin: Manage who has access to your gym.
members.descStaff: View members, open their profile and track progress.
members.removeMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently remove {name}? This cannot be undone — consider archiving instead.

machines.title: Machines
machines.count: {count} {count, plural, one {machine} other {machines}} in your gym.

insights.title: Insights
insights.desc: Machine usage and trends over the chosen period.
insights.footnote: Trend compares the chosen period with the previous period of equal length. Figures refresh every 5 minutes.

exercises.title: Exercise library
exercises.desc: Pick standard exercises from the central catalog or manage your own — both are available in your training plans.
exercises.catalogCount: {count} exercises in the catalog. Select several (or all results) and add them to your gym in one go.
exercises.noResultsMyEq: No exercises found for your equipment.
exercises.noCustom: You don't have any custom exercises yet.
exercises.customCount: {count} custom {count, plural, one {exercise} other {exercises}}. Only visible within your gym.
exercises.emptyHint: Create a custom exercise with your own media, execution and tips.
exercises.consultProfessional: Unsure about the technique? Always consult a professional.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.desc: Who did what, and when — within your gym.

requests.title: Plan requests
requests.desc: Requests from members for a new or updated training plan.
requests.emptyDesc: There are no plan requests in this category.

staff.title: Staff
staff.desc: Invite staff (coaches) and set what each person is allowed to do.
staff.inviteHint: The staff member gets the default daily coach permissions. Adjust them per person below.
staff.noStaff: No staff yet. Invite your first coach with the form above.
staff.removeMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently remove {name}?

training.label: Training
training.description: Milestones for the number of completed workouts.

consistency.label: Consistency
consistency.description: Rewards for training regularly and persistently.

community.label: Community
community.description: Your profile, first steps and engagement.

training_first.title: First workout
training_first.description: You completed your very first workout. The start of your journey.

training_count_10.title: 10 workouts
training_count_10.description: Ten workouts on the board — the habit is growing.

training_count_100.title: 100 workouts
training_count_100.description: A hundred workouts — you're a regular now.

training_count_250.title: 250 workouts
training_count_250.description: Two hundred fifty workouts. Impressive perseverance.

training_count_500.title: 500 workouts
training_count_500.description: Five hundred workouts. A true veteran.

consistency_streak_3.title: 3 days in a row
consistency_streak_3.description: Trained three days in a row.

consistency_streak_7.title: 7 days in a row
consistency_streak_7.description: Trained every day for a full week.

consistency_streak_30.title: 30 days in a row
consistency_streak_30.description: A whole month of daily discipline.

consistency_streak_100.title: 100 days in a row
consistency_streak_100.description: A hundred days unbroken. Legendary discipline.

consistency_member_365.title: 1 year active
consistency_member_365.description: A whole year as a member of your gym.

strength_first_pr.title: First PR
strength_first_pr.description: You set your first personal record.

strength_volume_1000.title: 1,000 kg moved
strength_volume_1000.description: Lifted a thousand kilos of total volume.

strength_volume_10000.title: 10,000 kg moved
strength_volume_10000.description: Ten thousand kilos total — it adds up.

strength_volume_100000.title: 100,000 kg moved
strength_volume_100000.description: A hundred thousand kilos of total volume.

cardio_distance_100k.title: 100 km total
cardio_distance_100k.description: A hundred kilometers of cardio combined.

cardio_time_10h.title: 10 hours cardio
cardio_time_10h.description: Ten hours of cardio in total.

cardio_marathon_training.title: Marathon training
cardio_marathon_training.description: Completed a long 30 km endurance run.

goals_first.title: First goal reached
goals_first.description: You reached your first personal goal.

goals_bodyfat_improved.title: Body fat improved
goals_bodyfat_improved.description: Your body fat percentage has measurably dropped.

goals_muscle_gained.title: Muscle gained
goals_muscle_gained.description: Your muscle mass has measurably increased.

goals_first_measurement.title: First body measurement
goals_first_measurement.description: You completed your first body measurement.

community_profile_complete.title: Profile complete
community_profile_complete.description: You filled in your profile completely.

community_first_schema_done.title: First schedule completed
community_first_schema_done.description: You completed your first training schedule in full.

pdf.safety: When in doubt, always consult a professional / trainer.

schemaAssigned.title: New training schedule
schemaAssigned.pushBody: A new training schedule is ready for you.
schemaAssigned.introDefault: Your trainer has set up '{schema}' for you.

schemaRequest.newBody: {member} has requested a new training schedule.
schemaRequest.receivedBody: Your trainer has received your schedule request. You'll hear from us as soon as there's an update.

memberSchema.approvedBody: '{schema}' has been approved. Activate it to start training.
memberSchema.rejectedBody: Your coach is asking for changes to '{schema}'.
memberSchema.rejectedBodyNote: Your coach is asking for changes to '{schema}'. "{note}"

maintenance.dueBody: '{name}' needs maintenance now. Please schedule it as soon as possible.
maintenance.warnBody: '{name}' is nearing a maintenance limit. Keep an eye on this machine.
maintenance.performedBody: Maintenance on '{name}' is done and the machine is active again.
maintenance.outOfServiceBody: '{name}' has been taken out of service.

schemaRequestReceived.reason: You're receiving this email because a member of {gym} requested a training schedule.
schemaRequestReceived.heading: New schedule request
schemaRequestReceived.body: {member} requested a new training schedule. Goal: {goal}.
schemaRequestReceived.subject: Schedule request from {member}

memberSchemaSubmitted.reason: You're receiving this email because a member of {gym} submitted their own training schedule for review.
memberSchemaSubmitted.heading: Schedule to review
memberSchemaSubmitted.body: {member} built their own training schedule and submitted it for review: {schema}. Review it, adjust if needed and approve or reject it.
memberSchemaSubmitted.subject: Schedule to review from {member}

memberSchemaReviewed.reason: You're receiving this email because your coach at {gym} reviewed your self-built schedule.
memberSchemaReviewed.bodyApproved: Your self-built schedule {schema} has been approved. Activate it to start training.
memberSchemaReviewed.bodyRejected: Your coach is asking for changes to your schedule {schema}.

schemaRequestStatus.reason: You're receiving this email because the status of your schedule request at {gym} changed.
schemaRequestStatus.heading: Update on your schedule request
schemaRequestStatus.body: The status of your training schedule request is now: {status}.
schemaRequestStatus.subject: Your schedule request: {status}

achievementEarned.reason: You're receiving this email because you earned a new trophy at {gym}.
achievementEarned.heading: 🏆 New trophy earned!
achievementEarned.subject: 🏆 Trophy earned: {title}

maintenanceAlert.reason: You're receiving this email because you're responsible for equipment maintenance at {gym}.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language. Your choice is remembered and applies across all your devices.

401.title: Please log in
401.description: You're not logged in (anymore). Log in again to continue to this page.

403.title: No access
403.description: You don't have access to this page. It may belong to another role or gym. Ask your administrator if you think this is a mistake.

404.title: Page not found
404.description: The page you're trying to open doesn't exist, has moved, or you may not have access to it.

500.title: Something went wrong
500.description: An unexpected error occurred on our side. Try again shortly — if it keeps failing, we'll look into it.

503.title: Please wait
503.description: The service is temporarily unavailable, for example due to maintenance. Try again in a few minutes.

auth.title: Log in
auth.subtitle: Welcome back to <name>{name}</name>.
auth.highlight2: Scan a machine, see the exercise instantly
auth.magicLinkHint: We'll email you a secure link — no password needed.

check.title: Check your inbox
check.description: We've sent you a magic link. Click the link to log in.
check.devNote: In development the link is printed to the server console (terminal) instead of emailed.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: One more step — confirm it's you.
twoFactor.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
